name: fuzztesting
description: A minimalist, self-hosted fuzzing orchestration tool written in Go. fuzztesting strips down complex fuzzing infrastructure to its bare essentials, providing simple bot coordination and file-based result storage without any cloud dependencies.

scripts.e2e: npm run docker:up && npm test && npm run docker:down
scripts.e2e:ci: docker compose up -d && npx wait-on http://localhost:8088/health && playwright test && docker compose down
